posts.title: Getting Started with Next.js 16
posts.excerpt: Learn how to build modern web applications with Next.js 16 and its new features.
posts.content: Next.js 16 brings exciting new features including improved server actions, better performance, and enhanced developer experience. In this blog post, we'll explore how to get started with the latest version.
posts.author: Santosh

posts.title: Building Beautiful UIs with Tailwind CSS
posts.excerpt: Discover how to create stunning user interfaces using Tailwind CSS framework.
posts.content: Tailwind CSS has revolutionized the way we build user interfaces. Its utility-first approach makes it easy to create beautiful, responsive designs without writing custom CSS.
posts.author: Santosh

posts.title: Mastering TypeScript for React Development
posts.excerpt: A comprehensive guide to using TypeScript with React for type-safe applications.
posts.content: TypeScript has become essential for building robust React applications. Learn how to leverage TypeScript's type system to catch errors early and improve code maintainability.
posts.author: Santosh
